S.FORM: Wink Bowman 1 bulad 22 demiad, 1916 a mihca, Wink Bowman, miunduay. (mapatay i 2001 a mihca)
S.PHON: wink bowman * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, wink bowman, miunduaj. (mapataj i **** a miħʦa)
